name: board-games
description: 多款棋盘游戏合集 / Multi-Board Game Collection - 五子棋、围棋、国际象棋、中国象棋、军棋翻翻棋
author: Your Name

scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && node tools/android-gradle.mjs assembleDebug && node tools/copy-android-apk.mjs debug
scripts.start: node --input-type=module -e "import path from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const entry = path.resolve(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json), 'tools/run-electron.mjs'); await import(pathToFileURL(entry).href);"
scripts.start:dev: node --input-type=module -e "process.env.GOMOKU_ELECTRON_DEV='1'; import path from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const entry = path.resolve(path.dirname(process.env.npm_package_json), 'tools/run-electron.mjs'); await import(pathToFileURL(entry).href);"
